description_long: This is a compact, single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in horizontal gray siding, punctuated by several rectangular windows and a single white entry door. The interior layout is visible, featuring distinct rooms including a living area with a TV, a kitchen with cabinetry, a bathroom, and a bedroom. The windows are arranged in a practical, asymmetrical pattern, providing natural light to the main living spaces. The main entryway is simple, with a plain white door and no porch or decorative overhang. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban neighborhoods or compact residential lots.
description: A modern, single-story house with gray siding, flat roof, and asymmetrical windows. The interior layout is visible, showing a living area, kitchen, bathroom, and bedroom.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the house with three rectangular windows and the main entry door visible on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the living area with wall art and a TV, as well as the open layout of the main room.
description_view_2: This side features two windows and a secondary white door, with the bathroom area visible inside.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the kitchen and bathroom areas, showing cabinetry and interior partitions.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no porch or overhang, flush with the exterior wall
